verdict.summary: Kafka ACLs deny the client access to the topic. Missing ACL entry, wrong principal, or authorizer misconfigured.

dead_ends.action: Disable the authorizer to make it work
dead_ends.why_fails: Disabling authorization removes all access control. Any client can read/write any topic. Security risk in production.

dead_ends.action: Grant all permissions with a wildcard ACL on all resources
dead_ends.why_fails: Wildcard ACLs defeat the purpose of access control. Grant minimum required permissions per principal.

workarounds.action: Add the specific ACL for the client principal
workarounds.how: kafka-acls.sh --add --allow-principal User:my-app --operation Read --operation Describe --topic my_topic --bootstrap-server localhost:9092

workarounds.action: Verify the client is authenticating with the correct principal
workarounds.how: Check JAAS config: sasl.jaas.config=...username="my-app"...; kafka-acls.sh --list --topic my_topic

workarounds.action: Check authorizer logs for the exact denial reason
